title: Immorta Bio's SenoVax + Stem Cell Combo Doubles Mouse Lifespan; Accepted at IMMUNOLOGY2026
description: Immorta Bio's combination of senolytic vaccine SenoVax and StemCellRevivify stem cell therapy produced ~84% median lifespan extension in validated aging mouse models. Research accepted at AAI's IMMUNOLOGY2026.

title: ARPA-H Launches $144M PROSPR Program for First Phase 3 Aging Trials
description: ARPA-H awarded $144M to seven teams to build infrastructure for phase 3 trials of aging interventions including rapamycin, semaglutide, and SGLT2 inhibitors in healthy adults.

title: David Sinclair at Dubai Summit: Aging Reversal Human Trials Imminent
description: David Sinclair announced at the 2026 Dubai summit that scientists are preparing human clinical trials to reverse aging using epigenetic reprogramming, having already reversed markers by 75% in animal tissues.

title: Rhonda Patrick Introduces 'Peakspan' -- Aging is Asynchronous by System
description: Dr. Rhonda Patrick shared a new framework proposing 'Peakspan' to measure how long you maintain 90% of peak function, noting each body system ages on its own independent timeline.

title: Life Biosciences Begins First Human Epigenetic Reprogramming Trial
description: Life Biosciences, cofounded by David Sinclair, secured FDA approval for the first human cellular reprogramming trial to restore vision in glaucoma and NAION patients.

title: Top Longevity Startups 2026: $13.1B Across 93 Companies; Epigenetic Reprogramming Leads
description: Comprehensive 2026 ranking shows Altos Labs ($3B), Oura ($1.2B), and Retro Biosciences ($1.2B) lead longevity funding. Epigenetic reprogramming is the best-funded modality at $3.3B.

title: Longevity Biotech Market Valued at $12.5B in 2026, Projected to Hit $45.8B by 2033
description: New market analysis projects the longevity biotech market to grow at 20.4% CAGR through 2033, driven by AI integration, regulatory frameworks, and rapid adoption in specialized longevity clinics.

title: Brown University Wins $22M to Test Anti-Aging Drug Censavudine in Humans
description: ARPA-H-funded project will test HIV drug Censavudine to reduce chronic DNA-triggered inflammation and slow aging in 200+ healthy adults aged 60-65 over 48 weeks.

title: Longevity Anti-Senescence Therapy Market to Reach $19.3B by 2030
source: National Law Review / Business Research Co.
description: Market growing at 6% CAGR driven by multi-drug combinations (metformin + rapamycin), expanding longevity clinics, and organ-on-a-chip aging research models.

title: Cordyceps Mushroom Molecule Prolongs Lifespan if Taken at Correct Time of Day
description: New study shows cordyceps militaris compounds extend lifespan in model organisms when administered at specific circadian time points, highlighting chronobiology's role in longevity interventions.

title: Could Aging Leave a 'Memory' That Spreads and Passes to the Next Generation?
description: Emerging research explores whether aging-related epigenetic changes can propagate between cells and potentially be inherited across generations.

title: Anti-Aging Therapy Market Targeting $420B Milestone Draws Investor Interest
description: Investors are increasingly allocating capital to anti-aging therapeutics as the broader longevity market approaches a projected $420B valuation.

title: Rapamycin Protects Against Age-Triggering DNA Damage: Oxford Study in Aging Cell
description: University of Oxford study shows low-dose rapamycin reduces T cell DNA damage and senescence markers in older adults by inhibiting the mTOR pathway.

title: Next-Gen Senotherapeutics: AI/ML-Driven Strategies for Aging Interventions
description: Comprehensive review covers AI-driven discovery of novel senotherapeutics using machine learning to identify and target senescent cells more effectively.

title: Lifespan.io Rejuvenation Roundup: Senolytic Effectiveness, NK Cell Restoration, FDA Reprogramming Trial
description: February 2026 roundup covers mitochondrial stress boosting senolytic effectiveness, Life Biosciences' FDA-cleared reprogramming trial, and natural killer cell rejuvenation research.

title: Longevity Market 2026-2036: AI, Genomics and Regenerative Medicine Drive Shift to Institutional Healthcare
description: Comprehensive report finds longevity market transitioning from wellness to institutional healthcare, with longitudinal health data emerging as durable competitive assets.

title: Norn Group: Industrializing Longevity with $34M in Research Grants and Clinical Trial Framework
description: Norn Group reports deploying $34M through Impetus Grants for high-impact aging research, building talent programs, and developing clinical trial frameworks specifically for aging.

title: Belgium's Long-Time Biotech Investor Shifts Focus to Longevity
description: Established Belgian biotech investor stepping back from traditional life sciences to focus on longevity investments, signaling a strategic shift in institutional capital allocation.

title: Global Longevity Federation Conference Set for March 23-24, 2026 in Rome
description: GLF-2026 hybrid event will gather global experts in Rome to discuss the future of longevity, healthy aging, and regenerative medicine.

title: Optimism Linked to 11-15% Longer Lifespan: Landmark Cohort Analysis
description: Analysis of two large cohorts found higher optimism associated with 11-15% longer lifespan and significantly higher odds of reaching age 85+, independent of health behaviors.

title: Stanford Medicine: Organ Clocks Reveal Brain Age Predicts Lifespan Most Strongly
description: Stanford team used ML on 45,000 samples to identify organ-specific protein signatures. Those with biologically younger brains were most likely to outlive peers.

title: Valter Longo to Present at Stanford on Fasting-Mimicking Diets and Longevity
description: USC gerontology professor Valter Longo, pioneer of fasting-mimicking diets, presenting at Stanford Medicine on longevity research and transforming healthy aging protocols.

title: Senolytic Vaccines: From ADCs to CAR-T, a Comprehensive Review of Next-Gen Approaches
description: Detailed review of senolytic strategies including antibody-drug conjugates targeting ApoD, GPNMB vaccines that extended progeroid mouse lifespan, and NKG2D CAR-T cells eliminating senescent cells.

title: The $63B Longevity Revolution: How Science Is Rewriting the Rules of Aging
description: Global longevity market projected to reach $63B by 2035 at 10.37% CAGR, with cellular reprogramming, senolytics, AI drug discovery, and biomarker science as four key pillars.

title: Cordyceps Boosts NK Cell Activity and VO2 Max in Human Trials: 2026 Review
description: 2026 review compiles clinical evidence that Cordyceps militaris increases NK cell activity, IgA, and VO2 max in healthy adults, supporting its role in immune and mitochondrial health.
